name: Hospitality
body: High-volume linen and towel processing with the throughput and reliability busy properties demand.

name: Athletic Facilities
body: Fast turnaround on towels and athletic wear, with extraction that cuts drying time and energy cost.

name: Healthcare
body: Hygienic, repeatable wash programs for healthcare linens where consistency is non-negotiable.

name: Industrial
body: Heavy-soil industrial laundry and uniform programs handled by machines built to run hard.

name: Food & Animal Processing
body: Sanitation-grade laundry for food and animal processing environments with demanding wash standards.

name: Cleaners & Dry Cleaning
body: Modern wet-cleaning with the Harmony system as a gentle, solvent-free path for cleaners.
